faq_q1: Am I allowed to use the world on a public server?
faq_a1_part1: Yes, you may use our world on a public server, but you are required to draw attention to our project and inform us in advance.
faq_a1_part2: For full details on how you are permitted to use our world, please refer to our
faq_q2: Does it cost money to play the world?
faq_a2: No, the world is completely free to play. The only requirement is a copy of Minecraft - once you have that, you can download and play the world at no additional cost.
faq_q3: If Projekt City is free, how does it finance itself?
faq_a3: It does not. Projekt City is a personal hobby project by itsmarian and SuffixHD, developed entirely in our free time. We do not rely on income from this project, although CurseForge does generate a small amount of revenue each month.
faq_q4: On which platforms can you find Projekt City?
faq_a4_part1: You can find Projekt City on Instagram, Threads, TikTok, and YouTube - with more platforms to follow. All our social media channels and important links are available at
faq_q5: I have found an error - what should I do?
faq_a5_part1: Thank you for taking the time to report it. You can submit a bug report using the following form:
faq_a5_part2: Please fill out the form as precisely as possible and we will look into the issue. If we require further information, we will reach out to you directly.
faq_q6: When will there be a new update for the map?
faq_a6_part1: Our latest update, V5.0, is out now and ready to download!
faq_a6_part2: You can download it directly at
faq_q7: How do I use the navigation bar?
faq_a7_para1: The navigation bar is available on every page within Projekt City.
faq_a7_para3: On the left, you will find our logo and a scrolling text. Clicking on it will always take you back to our main page.
faq_a7_para4: In the center, you will find links to our most important pages. Simply click on one of the labels to open the corresponding page.
faq_a7_para5: On the right, there are three icons linking to external pages and tools that are not part of the Projekt City website directly.
faq_a7_curseforge: icon will take you to our CurseForge page for more information about the project.
faq_a7_language: icon will change the language of the page.
